allow: PowerShell($p = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node_modules\\npm\\bin\\npx-cli.js"\); foreach\($x in $p\){ if\(Test-Path $x\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $x" } }; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Source; \(Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name -join ', ')
